overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing an armored warrior character ascending snow-covered stone steps through a rocky canyon toward an ancient Chinese temple gate. The environment transitions from dark enclosed passages to a bright mountain vista, featuring traditional architecture with red walls, burning braziers, and intricate stone carvings.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered stone stairway through rocky canyon

agents.ego_description: walking steadily up the snow-dusted stone steps through the narrow rocky passage

entered.detail: tall dark rock face with red glowing patches rising alongside the path
steep rocky cliff face framing the right side of the stairway
ancient worn stone steps ascending through the canyon, partially covered in snow
snow-dusted stone pathway with footprints visible
metal fire bowl emitting warm orange light and smoke

segments.scene_description: The character begins ascending a narrow, snow-covered stone stairway flanked by tall rock walls. The environment is dimly lit with a warm glow from a burning brazier visible in the distance on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky passage with wooden walkways and overhead canopy openings

events.description: passing under an opening in the rock ceiling allowing natural light to filter down onto the stairs

agents.ego_description: continuing to climb the stairs, passing wooden structures and railings on the left side

entered.detail: elevated wooden platform with railings attached to the rock wall
gap in the rock ceiling revealing tree branches and daylight above

segments.scene_description: The passage continues upward with wooden walkways appearing on the left. Natural light begins filtering through openings above, illuminating the snow-dusted steps as the character progresses through the rocky corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple courtyard approach with red walls and burning braziers

events.description: exiting the narrow canyon into a wider area with visible temple architecture and red walls
approaching burning braziers that cast warm orange light on the red temple walls

agents.ego_description: walking toward the main temple gate, passing large burning braziers on either side

entered.detail: vibrant red painted wall with traditional Chinese architectural details
vibrant red painted wall with weathered wooden beams
large metal bowl with bright flames illuminating the entrance area
stone sculptures lining the path alongside the temple walls
cascading water visible in the distance between the temple structures

segments.scene_description: The environment opens into a temple courtyard with striking red walls and traditional Chinese architecture. The character approaches the main gate, passing burning braziers that illuminate the intricate carvings and snow-covered stonework, with a waterfall visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: ornate temple gate interior with carved pillars

events.description: entering the dark interior archway of the temple gate structure
approaching the bright exit revealing snow-capped mountains in the distance

agents.ego_description: walking through the temple gate and pausing to look out at the expansive snowy mountain landscape

entered.detail: massive stone arch with intricate carvings framing the mountain view
decorative stone pendants and wind chimes suspended from the gate ceiling
snow-covered mountain peaks visible through the gate opening in bright daylight

segments.scene_description: The character enters the ornate temple gate, passing beneath hanging ornaments and through carved stone pillars. The scene transitions from the dark interior toward a bright opening, revealing a breathtaking view of snow-covered mountains visible through the archway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous ascent from a dim, enclosed rocky canyon into the expansive brightness of a mountain temple. It begins with the character climbing a narrow, snow-covered stone stairway flanked by towering rock walls, where the only light comes from a distant burning brazier. As the character progresses, the passage opens slightly to reveal wooden walkways and natural light filtering from above, illuminating the dusted steps. The scene then expands into a temple courtyard featuring striking red walls and burning braziers that highlight intricate carvings and a distant waterfall. Finally, the camera moves through an ornate temple gate and beneath hanging ornaments, transitioning from the shaded interior toward a breathtaking vista of snow-covered mountains visible through the archway.
